```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement feature engineering pipeline for ML models"
---
# Feature Engineering
## Task
Build a feature engineering pipeline for ML models.
## Requirements
1. Handle missing values (imputation strategies). 2. Encode categorical variables (one-hot, label, target encoding).
3. Scale/normalize numerical features. 4. Create interaction and polynomial features.
5. Implement feature selection (importance, correlation, variance).
## Constraints
- Fit on train data only. Transform test with train statistics. Pipeline must be reproducible.
## Success Criteria
- Features engineered systematically. No data leakage. Pipeline reproducible.
```
